message:
test(frankenpandas): activate ,ignore doctests now that prelude is complete (br-exgd0 / fd90.150)

fd90.150: crates/frankenpandas/src/lib.rs had two doctests marked
,ignore that predated the fd90.121-fd90.144 prelude expansion. Now
that the prelude exposes everything the examples reference, both
should be runnable doctests so they guard against prelude regressions
exactly where users will FIRST encounter the API (crate top-level
rustdoc).

Changes:
1. Crate-level usage example (line 9): ,ignore → runnable. Replaced
   the println!{} with an assert that validates the expected filter
   result (Alice 30 stays; Bob 25 drops).
2. Prelude module example (line 193): ,ignore → runnable. Added a
   handful of let-bindings for prelude items (DType::Int64,
   Scalar::Int64, JsonOrient::Records, JoinType::Inner) so the
   doctest actively exercises that the prelude glob covers them.

Verified:
- cargo test -p frankenpandas — 6 lib + 2 integration + 2 NEWLY
  ACTIVE doctests all pass

Pure additive doctest activation. No behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
